definitions.text: bruke de evnene og midlene en har, best mulig
definitions.translation: use the abilities and means one has as well as possible

examples.no: fotballaget har forvaltet sitt pund godt
examples.en: the football team has made good use of its talents

definitions.translation: manage funds one is entrusted with

examples.no: arvingen hadde forvaltet sitt pund på en god måte
examples.en: the heir had managed his talents well
